project_type: TypeScript/Next.js monorepo (pnpm workspaces + turbo) with ~16 apps and ~80+ packages
test_framework: vitest with inline tests per app (apps/*/src/__tests__/)
verification_instructions: 1. Run typecheck for both apps. 2. Run vitest for both apps. 3. Confirm no new TS errors.
setup_instructions: node_modules already installed. Use pnpm turbo to run tasks.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network, Node.js 22, pnpm, no Docker needed
contribution_requirements: Real JSX (no placeholder/fake components), use @quant/shared-ui + @quant/realtime + @quant/brand, loading/error/empty/success states, responsive 360-1440px, dark mode support, gates must pass (typecheck + test)

key_patterns.app_router: All apps use Next.js App Router (src/app/), 'use client' for interactive pages
key_patterns.hooks: Custom hooks in src/hooks/ for data fetching/state (useChat, useAIChat, useConversations, etc.)
key_patterns.shared_ui: @quant/shared-ui exports: AppShell, TopBar, BottomNav, ChatList, ChatBubble, ChatInput, TypingIndicator, AIChat, Sidebar, AnimatedPage, LoadingState, ErrorState, EmptyState, ThemeProvider, CommandPaletteUI
key_patterns.brand: @quant/brand exports: colors (primary/accent/neutral/semantic/surface), spring animations, app icons
key_patterns.realtime: @quant/realtime exports: WebSocketClient (with auto-reconnect, channels, heartbeat), PresenceManager, ChannelManager, DeliveryManager, TypedEventEmitter, event types (MessageNewEvent, MessageTypingEvent, MessageReadEvent, etc.)
key_patterns.auth_pattern: localStorage token, getAuthToken/getAuthHeaders/getWsAuthUrl helpers in src/lib/auth.ts
key_patterns.api_routes: Next.js API routes in src/app/api/ proxy to backend

directory_structure: apps/quantchat/ - Snapchat-style chat app (Next.js), apps/quantai/ - AI assistant hub (Next.js), packages/realtime/ - WS client/server, packages/shared-ui/ - shared React components, packages/brand/ - design tokens
